---
title: "Gary S. Collins, PhD"
subtitle: |
  Professor of Medical Statistics\
  125th Anniversary Chair \
  University of Birmingham \
  Email: g.s.collins@bham.ac.uk
description-meta: "Gary Collins' research interests are primarily focused on methodological aspects in the development and fair evaluation of clinical prediction models (including machine learning) and has published extensively in this area (see research output or google scholar). His other research interests lie in improving the transparency, openness and quality of health research, where he leads the EQUATOR Network activities in the UK."
image: "files/profile/Gary_COLLINS_Headshot.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 80%
  links:
    - text: UoB   # use image logo
      href: https://research.birmingham.ac.uk/en/persons/gary-collins
      target: _blank     
    - icon: twitter-x
      href: https://twitter.com/gscollins
    - text: "{{< fa brands bluesky >}}"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/gscollins.bsky.social
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gary-collins-4101a443/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gary-collins-4101a443/
      target: _blank
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@gcollins2000uk     
      target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2772-2316
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
      href: https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/A-2258-2014
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
      href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57944334400
      target: _blank
    - text: "![](/files/images/dimensions-logo.jpeg){width=15} Dimensions"  # use customize image or logo
      href: https://app.dimensions.ai/details/entities/publication/author/ur.016076401572.36
      target: _blank      
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=cVKF81gAAAAJ
      target: _blank

include-in-header: 
  - file: files/includes/_mswebmaster.js
---

::: {#hero-heading}
# Welcome

I am a [125th Anniversary Chair](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/research/125th-anniversary-fellows-and-chairs) and Professor of Medical Statistics in the [Department of Applied Health Sciences](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/about/college-of-medicine-and-health/applied-health-sciences) at the [University of Birmingham](https://www.birmingham.ac.uk/). I am also the Director of [EQUATOR Network](https://www.equator-network.org/). In 2024, I was awarded [NIHR Senior Investigator](https://www.nihr.ac.uk/people/professor-gary-collins) status.

Before joining the University of Birmingham in October 2025, I worked at the University of Oxford for 19 years, where I was a Professor of Medical Statistics.

# **My research interests include**

-   methodology for clinical prediction models (inc. predictive AI/machine learning)

-   methodology for evaluation and fairness assessment of clinical prediction models

-   reporting standards and guidelines

-   research transparency

-   meta-science

-   open science
:::
